message:
fix(llm): address round 5 review issues in retry, stream-timeout, and client

- Fix computeDelay jitter/cap order to match spec Section 6.6: cap first,
  then jitter (allows jitter to exceed maxDelayMs for thundering-herd
  desynchronization)
- Use Number.isFinite() for all retryLLMCall options validation (catches
  NaN and Infinity) and add backoffMultiplier validation
- Use Number.isFinite() for withStreamReadTimeout timeoutMs validation
- Use Number.isFinite() for Client streamReadTimeoutMs validation (allows
  0 to disable, rejects negative/NaN/Infinity)
- Move abort check before onRetry callback so we don't report retries
  that won't happen
- Fix leaked 1s cleanup timer in stream-timeout by clearing it when
  iterator.return() resolves first
- Fix misleading isRetryable comment to accurately describe the fallthrough

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
